chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-225 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.1028/2022 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1029/2022 (Stay) 22.09.2025.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner and no intimation has been received. This petition has been filed in the year 2022, since then no efforts have been made by learned counsel for the petitioner, which shows lack of interest on the part of petitioner, therefore the instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
